creator: gerhard@bigfoot.de
text:
There are no docs for the GNAT compiler packaged. Could anybody please package the docs available at ftp://ftp.cs.nyu.edu/pub/gnat/3.13p/gnat-3.13p-docs.tar.gz Probably best to package them as a seperate package gnat-docs as they're somewhat large.

Fix: 

Doh. Download    ftp://ftp.cs.nyu.edu/pub/gnat/3.13p/gnat-3.13p-docs.tar.gz unpack and view the docs. But currently the GNAT package doesn't include any docs, neither a man page nor the user's guide from the above mentioned tar.gz.
